_provenance.description: Lensed CMB Cl reference values for l=2..10, Planck18 preset
_provenance.note: cl[l,'tt'] values are dimensionless Cl (NOT l(l+1)Cl/2pi) as returned directly by classy lensed_cl()['tt']. Fixture is a best-effort placeholder; regenerate with scripts/regenerate_fixture.py on the reference platform before production use. TODO-OPUS-MANUAL: regenerate on Ubuntu 22.04 LTS with system gcc.

_units: dimensionless Cl (not l(l+1)Cl/2pi) — direct classy lensed_cl() output
